title: Cloud Solutions
excerpt: Cloud architecture, migration, and FinOps — resilient, scalable infrastructure with costs you can actually see and control.

seo.title: Cloud Architecture & Migration Services | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion designs cloud-native architecture, runs safe migrations, and brings cloud costs under control with FinOps. Resilient, scalable, observable infrastructure.

process.desc: Current estate, dependencies, cost, and risk.
Cloud-native design for resilience and scale.

blocks.text: The cloud rewards good architecture and punishes bad habits — usually with a surprise bill. Baalvion designs cloud-native systems that are resilient and scalable, migrates legacy estates safely, and brings spend under control with FinOps. We apply the patterns from [cloud-native architecture explained](/news/tech/cloud-native-architecture) to real production workloads.

items: **Safe migration:** incremental moves with rollback, not big-bang risk.
**Cost control:** FinOps so you can see and tune spend.
**Secure:** compliance and security designed in from the start.

blocks.text: We assess the current estate and its risks, architect a cloud-native target, migrate incrementally with rollback paths, then optimise continuously with FinOps and autoscaling. For legacy-heavy estates this follows [enterprise modernization](/news/insights/enterprise-modernization) and [legacy system migration](/news/insights/legacy-system-migration).

Kubernetes and containers, infrastructure as code, multi-cloud where it earns its keep, full observability, and FinOps tooling. We help you decide when Kubernetes is right — and when it isn't — in [Kubernetes for enterprises](/news/tech/kubernetes-for-enterprises) and [multi-cloud strategy](/news/tech/multi-cloud-strategy).

We operate multi-tenant infrastructure at scale, so our cloud advice is grounded in running real systems, not just designing them. Pair cloud with [DevOps](/services/devops) and [enterprise software](/services/enterprise-software) for a complete platform.

faqs.q: How do you keep cloud costs under control?
faqs.a: Through FinOps: cost visibility per service, right-sizing, autoscaling, and continuous tuning — so spend tracks value rather than surprising you.
We migrate incrementally with rollback paths rather than big-bang cutovers, keeping the business running throughout — see [legacy system migration](/news/insights/legacy-system-migration).
Not always. We help you weigh the trade-offs — see [Kubernetes for enterprises](/news/tech/kubernetes-for-enterprises).
It depends on your risk, portability needs, and complexity tolerance — explored in [multi-cloud strategy](/news/tech/multi-cloud-strategy).
